description.ko: 단일 백색광이 크리스탈 프리즘을 통해 생동감 넘치는 무지개 스펙트럼으로 변하는 빛의 굴절 현상을 시각적으로 구현하여, 과학과 예술의 교차점을 강조합니다.
description.en: A stunning visual representation of light refraction, where a single white beam transforms into a vibrant spectrum through a crystal prism, highlighting the intersection of science and art.

prompt: A macro cinematic shot of a triangular glass prism on a dark reflective surface, a single beam of pure white light hitting the edge and refracting into a brilliant, wide spectrum of rainbow colors. High-detail glass textures, caustic lighting effects, volumetric dust particles, 8k resolution, ray-traced reflections.
